description: An engineer is performing a routine safety inspection of a dam.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the dam safety inspection checklist from the asset management system.

expected_outcome.value: Engineer accesses the standard inspection form on their mobile device.

nodes.task_description: Visually inspect the dam's structure for any signs of cracking, seepage, or erosion and document the findings.

expected_outcome.value: Engineer documents observations and takes photos of any areas of concern.

nodes.task_description: Check the readings from instrumentation like piezometers and settlement monitors.

expected_outcome.value: Engineer records the latest instrumentation readings and compares them to historical trends.

nodes.task_description: Complete and submit the inspection report.

expected_outcome.value: Engineer submits the final report, noting that no critical issues were found.
